since_last: 82% of 84 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +5.01%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 82% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.73% · BTC +0.23% · Gold +1.04% · Nasdaq100 +1.66%. 82% of 84 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +5.01%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +5.01%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.61%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: CEVA is the standout at +10.34%
cards.body: Leaders: CEVA +10.34%, AMD +8.71%, ANET +8.28%, INOD +8.14%, RXRX +7.62%. Laggards: AVAV -4.33%, INTU -2.17%, HON -1.79%, MSFT -1.64%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.27% at $161.56
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.27% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
